summary: End-to-end testing of Breakfast in Bed by LaCole marketing site. All 7 backend pytest cases pass (100%). All critical frontend flows verified: hero rotation/CTAs, header buttons, floating Order Online, featured menu (12 items), reviews marquee, location map + directions, Monday Closed shown in dark red, catering form POST -> 201 with success toast and form cleared, HTML5 required-field validation, mobile hamburger menu opens with all nav items.

issues: Floating Order Online button visually overlaps the 'Made with Emergent' badge in the bottom-right corner on both desktop and mobile. Consider offsetting bottom/right or hiding the floating button when scrolled near the badge.

action_items: (Minor) Adjust position/z-index of FloatingOrder.jsx so it does not overlap the Emergent badge at bottom-right.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is defined AFTER it is referenced inside the POST /api/catering exception handler (logger configured on line 121, used on line 93). If the insert ever fails before the basicConfig block runs at import time, a NameError could occur. Python module-level execution makes this safe in practice, but logger should be initialized before route definitions for clarity.
server.py CateringInquiryCreate.event_date is a free-form string with no format validation; consider date type or regex.
Catering GET endpoint returns up to 500 docs without pagination — fine for MVP, but add pagination before going public.
CORS allow_origins falls back to '*' with allow_credentials=True; browsers will block credentialed cross-origin requests. Tighten origins in production.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed catering inquiries and status checks via API during tests (safe to leave or clean by prefix).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py and can be run with `pytest -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. data-testid keys in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds.js. Frontend public URL: https://akron-breakfast-gem.preview.emergentagent.com. Catering form successfully POSTs to /api/catering and shows success state; submitting empty form is blocked by native HTML5 validation. Mobile menu toggle is `header button` (first), no data-testid yet — consider adding one.
